profile.name: Ace Digital AS
profile.about: Ace Digital AS is a Norwegian holding company dedicated to creating value in the Bitcoin ecosystem, listed on Euronext Growth Oslo under ticker ACED. Incorporated in 2020 and based in Oslo, the company operates as the first Bitcoin treasury company listed on Euronext markets. Its vision is to be the Nordic region's leading platform for Bitcoin investments, with Bitcoin as a cornerstone of its balance sheet. The company accumulates Bitcoin as a treasury asset, provides advisory services to institutions adopting Bitcoin treasury strategies, and invests actively in Bitcoin-related subsidiaries and projects including Ace Funds AS (acquired October 2025).

people.name: Alexander Hagen
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: CEO at listing on Euronext Growth Oslo in September 2025.

keyFacts.label: First
keyFacts.value: First Bitcoin treasury company on Euronext markets

keyFacts.label: Acquisition
